variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 67961 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RVR420B130B
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 67961 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RVR420B130B
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 67961. This part is designed to meet high-performance standards, offering reliability and durability across a wide range of applications. Manufactured with precision and quality materials, it ensures optimal compatibility and functionality within your system, helping to maintain efficiency and extend the lifespan of your equipment. Whether used as part of a filtration system, hydraulic setup, or general machinery, this component delivers consistent performance under demanding conditions. Its robust construction and dependable design make it a trusted choice for maintaining system integrity and reducing downtime.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 130µ, Outer Diameter: 41.5 mm, Length: 96.0 mm, Thread: M16x1.5, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 130µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: MicroFit® MFHR55970 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RVR420B130B
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHR55970 UltraGen III Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RVR420B130B
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHR55970 UltraGen III Return Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
